principles.title: robustness_over_in_sample_beauty
principles.description: Prefer stable out-of-sample performance over strong in-sample metrics.
principles.enforcement_hint: penalize unstable walk-forward and high sensitivity candidates

principles.title: transparency_over_magic
principles.description: Every recommendation must be explainable and traceable.

principles.title: controlled_risk_over_signal_volume
principles.description: Do not increase trade count at the cost of risk discipline.
principles.enforcement_hint: apply risk bucket hard caps and no-trade conditions

principles.title: portfolio_usefulness_over_isolated_metrics
principles.description: Strategy quality includes marginal portfolio impact.
principles.enforcement_hint: include diversification and concentration diagnostics in score

principles.title: fast_rejection_of_weak_hypotheses
principles.enforcement_hint: reject on sanity and fragility checks before expensive evaluation

principles.title: regime_awareness
principles.description: Every strategy has compatible and suppressed regimes.
principles.enforcement_hint: require regime compatibility score in candidate evaluation

principles.title: cost_aware_realism
principles.description: Use realistic slippage, fee, and funding assumptions.
principles.enforcement_hint: block promotion if stress-cost scenario fails

principles.title: governance_discipline
principles.description: Lifecycle movement requires explicit evidence and audit trail.
principles.enforcement_hint: enforce stage-specific checklist and promotion history object
